title: Riemann Sum Explorer
description: Adjust the interval, number of rectangles, and sample point to see how Riemann sums approximate the area under a curve.

title: Secant to Tangent
description: Slide the second point along the curve and watch the secant line approach the tangent — the geometric heart of the derivative.

title: Taylor Polynomial Approximations
description: Build Taylor polynomials of increasing degree around a point and see how each added term improves the fit to sin(x).

title: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus, Part 2
description: Trace the area function F(x) = ∫ₐˣ f(t) dt and discover why its derivative recovers the integrand — FTC Part 2 in motion.
